title: Validated Registration Form
description: Build a registration endpoint POST /api/register with strict validation: email (required, valid email format), password (required, min 8 chars), name (required, max 100 chars), age (number, min 13). Return detailed error messages on 400.
skeleton:
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required, min 8
  name, required, max 100
  age, number
